description: Apply no feature changes to the baseline target cohort. Expected hazard and survival movement should be zero within numerical tolerance.
name: No-Change Control

description: Increase onboarding completion by 10 percentage points, bounded at 100%, for the baseline top-quartile risk cohort.
name: Onboarding Completion Improvement

description: Reduce support resolution time by 25%, with a 0.25-day floor, for the baseline top-quartile risk cohort.
name: Support Resolution Improvement

description: Increase adopted products by one, bounded at eight, for the baseline top-quartile risk cohort.
name: Product Adoption Expansion

description: Apply the onboarding, support-resolution, and product-adoption assumptions together to the same baseline top-quartile risk cohort.
name: Combined Retention Strategy

description: Increase support resolution time by 25% and add one service incident, within governed bounds, to verify adverse bidirectional sensitivity for the same cohort.
name: Service Friction Stress
